headline: Cloud ITSM Market Size by Solution Type, Deployment Mode - Global Forecast to 2031
summary: The global cloud ITSM market is projected to grow from USD 11.09 billion in 2025 to USD 23.04 billion by 2031, at a CAGR of 13.0%. Key drivers include IT process automation, hybrid workforce enablement, and the demand for standardized service management frameworks. Growth is hindered by data governance concerns and legacy infrastructure challenges. IT & ITeS industries are experiencing the fastest growth, driven by SLA compliance and automation needs. North America leads with advanced AI-driven
